3318870.name: AI Interrogation Simulator
3318870.description:
NOTE: This game requires a third-party AI service to play!!

AI Interrogation Simulator is an exciting new game where you will solve fascinating crimes with only your conversation skills.

You will dive into specific cases, interviewing the available suspects for each case and then finally issuing your findings.

Each suspect will be powered by a Large Language Model (LLM) such as those provided by OpenAI (e.g., GPT), Anthropic (e.g., Claude) or a local model (e.g., Llama). By connecting your own AI to the game, you will experience an AI-powered video game with unprecedented power and control.

You also get to create your own investigators, and switch between them freely. Consider how the suspects may respond to different types of characters!

Will you catch the real villains, or let them walk free? Only time will tell!

NOTE: This game requires a third-party AI service to play!!
